Spring Data JPA Parent
  1. org.springframework.data.jpa.domain

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.jpa.domain

Packages that use org.springframework.data.jpa.domain
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jpa.domain
JPA specific support classes to implement domain classes.
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository
Interfaces and annotations for JPA specific repositories.
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query
Query implementation to execute queries against JPA.
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.support
JPA repository implementations.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.jpa.domain used by org.springframework.data.jpa.domain
    Class
    Description
    AbstractAuditable
    Abstract base class for auditable entities.
    AbstractPersistable
    Abstract base class for entities.
    AbstractPersistable_
    Static metamodel for AbstractPersistable
    DeleteSpecification
    Specification in the sense of Domain Driven Design to handle Criteria Deletes.
    JpaSort
    Sort option for queries that wraps JPA metamodel Attributes for sorting.
    JpaSort.JpaOrder
    Custom Sort.Order that keeps a flag to indicate unsafe property handling, i.e. the String provided is not necessarily a property but can be an arbitrary expression piped into the query execution.
    JpaSort.Path
    Value object to abstract a collection of Attributes.
    PredicateSpecification
    Specification in the sense of Domain Driven Design.
    QAbstractAuditable
    QAbstractAuditable is a Querydsl query type for AbstractAuditable
    QAbstractPersistable
    QAbstractPersistable is a Querydsl query type for AbstractPersistable
    Specification
    Specification in the sense of Domain Driven Design.
    UpdateSpecification
    Specification in the sense of Domain Driven Design to handle Criteria Updates.
    UpdateSpecification.UpdateOperation
    Simplified extension to UpdateSpecification that only considers the UPDATE part without specifying a predicate.

    Description
    DeleteSpecification
    Specification in the sense of Domain Driven Design to handle Criteria Deletes.

    UpdateSpecification
    Specification in the sense of Domain Driven Design to handle Criteria Updates.
